MODULE: cosmos.integration.channels.__init__
FILE: cosmos/integration/channels/__init__.py (157 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Multi-Channel Messaging Hub
=======================================

Universal messaging integration supporting 10+ platforms.

Channels Supported:
- WhatsApp (via Baileys/whatsapp-web.js)
- Telegram (Bot API)
- Discord (Bot API)
- Slack (Socket Mode / Bolt)
- Signal (signal-cli)
- Matrix (ma

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_available_channels() -> dict
- async def setup_channel_hub(enabled_channels: list=None, configs: dict=None) -> ChannelHub
